thi4:1.0.63: Kassapa is the son and heir of the Buddha,whose mind is immersed in samādhi.He knows his past lives,he sees heaven and places of loss,
thi4:1.0.64: and has attained the end of rebirth:that sage has perfect insight.It’s because of these three knowledgesthat the brahmin is a master of the three knowledges.
thi4:1.0.65: In exactly the same way, Bhaddā daughter of Kapilais master of the three knowledges, conqueror of death.She bears her final body,having vanquished Māra and his mount.
thi4:1.0.66: Seeing the danger of the world,both of us went forth.Now we are tamed, our defilements have ended;we’ve become cooled and quenched.
